commit.message:
feat: add navigation, pre-chat options, footer links, escape hatch (HIT-12)

Let orchestrators choose their path instead of funneling everyone through
chat. Adds nav strip links, pre-chat options panel (collapses on first
message), footer with 5 links, and a post-chat escape hatch modal.
Mobile responsive with hamburger nav.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Linux system hardening via sysctl and access control

Add 21 new hardening settings for Linux across 3 new categories:
- Kernel (8): ASLR, kptr_restrict, dmesg, ptrace, BPF, perf,
  SysRq, user namespaces
- Network (9): IP forwarding, SYN cookies, ICMP, rp_filter,
  redirects, source routing, martians, IPv6
- Access Control (4): core dumps, USB storage, SSH root login,
  SSH password auth

Settings persist via /etc/sysctl.d/99-dustforge.conf with
fail-fast validation (sysctl -w before writing config). SSH
config uses safe idempotent editing that comments out all
existing directives before appending.

Automatically available to the cloud agent via the existing
privacy-scan/apply pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: authenticateApiRequestを使用してNext.js 16のcookies()非同期対応

Next.js 16ではcookies()が非同期関数になったため、
createRouteHandlerClient({ cookies })が正しく動作しなかった。
既存のauthenticateApiRequestヘルパーを使用する形に統一。

- notifications/list/route.ts
- teams/route.ts

- teams/[teamId]/members/route.ts
- teams/[teamId]/invite/route.ts

fix: replace %-style log formatting with f-strings and fix dev deps

Loguru does not interpolate %-style placeholders — they render
literally in output. Convert all logger calls across io.py, tools.py,
recorder.py and player.py to f-strings.

Move dev dependencies from [project.optional-dependencies] to
[dependency-groups] so uv sync --dev installs type stubs (types-tqdm,
types-redis) and resolves all 17 mypy errors.

- Windows toast notifications for alerts
- Win32 Beep API for sound alerts

loadStripePrices() was called without await, so the async fetch hadn't
completed by the time the trial-expired screen rendered. Users clicking
plan buttons got "Stripe not configured" because S.stripePrices was
still empty.

feat: セクション展開時にパンくずリストを動的更新 (#260)

* feat: セクション展開時にパンくずリストを動的更新

マスタ登録画面でセクション（材料、梱包材等）を展開すると、
URLのクエリパラメータ(?section=material)が更新され、
パンくずリストに「ホーム > マスタ登録 > 材料」のように
現在のセクション名が表示されるようにした。

- FormSectionにonOpenコールバックを追加
- 各セクションコンポーネントにonOpen propを伝搬
- MasterTabでrouter.replaceによるURL更新を実装
- パンくずの重複ラベル（マスタ登録が2回表示）を修正
- パンくずのマスタ登録クリックでセクション選択を解除

https://claude.ai/code/session_013VqV1WAkLDFVW6C5H88GaZ

* fix: PRレビュー指摘4件を修正

1. FormSectionのstale closure修正: setOpenをfunctional updaterに戻し、
   コールバックをupdater内で呼ぶことでopenSignalとの競合を防止
2. toggleSectionのstale state修正: functional updater内でwillOpenを
   判定し、onSectionFocusの呼び出しとstate更新の整合性を確保
3. キーマッピングのハードコード排除: SECTION_KEY_TO_PARAM定数マップを
   導入し、camelCase→kebab-case変換を一元管理
4. セクション閉じ時のURLクリア: onCloseコールバックを追加し、
   セクションを閉じた際にURLからsectionパラメータを除去

https://claude.ai/code/session_013VqV1WAkLDFVW6C5H88GaZ

* fix: state updater関数内の副作用を除去

FormSection・MasterListViewのsetOpen/setOpenState updater内で
router.replaceを呼んでいた問題を修正。React規約に従いupdaterを
純粋関数に保つため、useRefで最新のstate値を追跡し、
updater外でコールバックを呼ぶパターンに変更。

https://claude.ai/code/session_013VqV1WAkLDFVW6C5H88GaZ

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: load Stripe prices before trial expiry check

loadStripePrices() was called after the trial/subscription expiry
checks which throw errors, so prices never loaded on the trial-expired
screen. Moved the call before the checks. Also raised toast z-index
to 1100 so toasts appear above the loading overlay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: comprehensive mobile/responsive fixes for home page

- Code block grid: changed md:grid-cols-2 → sm:grid-cols-2 so it
  splits earlier; added min-w-0 to both columns to prevent grid blowout
- pre tag: smaller text (text-[11px]) and tighter padding (p-3) on
  mobile so code content fits without overflowing container
- npm install snippets: text-xs on mobile, truncate/overflow-hidden on
  wrapper at lines 956 and 1302 so long package name can't push layout
- Feature bullet titles: min-w-0 + truncate to prevent monospace
  "npm install @facesmash/sdk" title from overflowing its flex cell
- Hero visualization: added sm: breakpoint (220px → 280px → 360px)
  instead of jumping straight from 280px to 360px at md
- Hero blobs: responsive w/h (350→500→700px and 250→350→500px)
  instead of fixed 700px / 500px that dominated small screens
- Dev-experience section blob: 200→350→500px responsive sizing
- CTA section blob: 250→400→600px responsive sizing
- Login form card: max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] on xs, p-6 on mobile
- Mobile menu: max-h accounts for h-16 navbar at sm+ breakpoint
- Comparison table: -mx-4 sm:-mx-6 / px-4 sm:px-6 alignment fix;
  reduced min-w from 640px → 580px; text-xs on mobile
- Device screens: added gap-y-6 for cleaner wrapping on small phones
- Footer grid: gap-6 on mobile → gap-8 on sm+ (was gap-10 everywhere)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[fix] 발행 흐름 버그 5건 추가 수정

Bug1: clearCheckpoint() await 누락 → 다음 배치 잘못된 resume 방지
Bug2: deferred LinkedIn URL에 resolvePostUrl 적용 (?p=ID 변환)
Bug3: deferred 소셜 실행 시 포스트가 여전히 future 상태면 skip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix order_monitor: use algo order API for SL status checks

The SL orders are placed via /fapi/v1/algoOrder (algo/conditional), but
order_monitor was querying /fapi/v1/order which returns "Order does not
exist" — causing an infinite error loop every 30s on the VPS.

Added futures_get_algo_order() and use it for SL checks.

commit.message:
Treat ExitPlanMode as context reset boundary

Plan mode exit clears context but leaves no compact_boundary marker in
the JSONL. Quality signals from before plan mode were dragging scores
down even after a clean context clear. Now detects ExitPlanMode tool
use as another signal reset trigger alongside compact_boundary.

commit.message:
fix: harden security across cloud agent, settings store, and IPC handlers

- Fix macOS elevation escaping gap: use AppleScript `quoted form of` for
  safe path handling instead of manual string escaping
- Add DNS rebinding protection: resolve hostnames at connect time in
  cloud agent discover() and postApi() to block SSRF via rebinding
- Restrict cloud startup-toggle to disable-only: prevent compromised
  cloud server from injecting arbitrary autorun commands
- Replace processedRequestIds Set with TTL-based Map (10min expiry) to
  prevent request ID poisoning via flooding
- Encrypt cloud API key at rest using Electron safeStorage (DPAPI on
  Windows, Keychain on macOS, libsecret on Linux) with transparent
  legacy plaintext migration and headless fallback
- Harden perfKillProcess: block PIDs 1-4 (system) and process.pid (self)
- Add auto-restart setting and configurable update check interval

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Per-session quality: reset signals on compact, fix fill estimation, add PostCompact hook

Quality scores were stuck across sessions because signals accumulated over
full JSONL history instead of resetting at compaction boundaries. Fill
estimation used a flat 5K/message guess that was wildly inaccurate.

Changes:
- Reset all signal accumulators on compact_boundary markers in JSONL parser
- Replace dead total_input_tokens path with char-length estimation from parsed data
- Add live-fill sidecar bridge: statusline.js writes used_percentage to
  live-fill.json, quality scorer reads it for ground-truth fill data
- Add PostCompact hook (new in Claude Code v2.1.76) to force immediate
  quality cache refresh after compaction, bypassing 120s throttle
- Add force parameter to quality_cache() for PostCompact use
- Fix potential UnboundLocalError for density_ratio in else branch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add QUIC keepalive to prevent idle connection drops

Without keep_alive_interval, QUIC connections silently close after 30s
of no application-level traffic. This caused T6 (Bootnode Loss) to fail
because peer connections died even though the peers were still alive.

Sets keep_alive_interval=15s and max_idle_timeout=60s on both server
and client transport configs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: T2-T7 Docker E2E topology tests

Add complete test infrastructure for 6 additional topologies:
- T2: Relay Path (2P+1B+1R) -- store-and-forward, role isolation, loop termination
- T3: Pull-Only (2P+1B+1R) -- anti-entropy delivery, push silence
- T4: Multi-Relay (3P+1B+2R) -- fan-out, dedup, bounded relay pushes
- T5: Partition/Heal (2P+2R+1B) -- iptables partition, convergence after heal
- T6: Bootnode Loss (3P+1B) -- steady-state after bootnode killed
- T7: Channel Isolation (3P+1R+1B) -- two channels, strict isolation

Each topology includes: Docker Compose file, per-node TOML configs,
test script with assertions, and log collection on teardown.
Also adds assert_min_total_items to common.sh and run-all.sh master script.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Design polish: token system, dark mode fixes, spacing normalization

Systematic design consistency improvements:

Token System (index.css):
- Add --color-primary/hover tokens with dark mode variants
- Add semantic --status-{success,warning,danger,info} color tokens
- Add --status-danger-bg/border for dark-mode-safe alert styling
- Add spacing scale: --space-{xs,sm,md,lg,xl,2xl,3xl} (4px base)
- Add type scale: --text-{hero,h1,h2,body,small,xs,label}
- Add radius scale: --radius-{sm,md,lg,pill}

Spacing Normalization:
- Button padding: 9px → 10px (consistent across all buttons)
- Input padding: 9px 12px → 10px 12px
- Metric-box padding: 16px 18px → 16px (symmetrical)
- Badge padding: 2px 8px → 3px 8px (vertically balanced)
- Hero grid gap: 36px → 32px (aligned to spacing scale)
- Hero status row gap: 10px → 12px
- Lane card padding: 14px → 16px
- Label-field gap: 4px → 8px (LoginPage)

Dark Mode Fixes:
- LoginPage error alert: hardcoded #fef2f2/#dc2626 → CSS variable tokens
- LoginPage button: hardcoded #2563eb → var(--color-primary)
- LoginPage inputs/form: border-radius 6px → 8px (consistent)

commit.message:
feat: relay store-and-forward, Item-Sync pull, sync server

Wire remaining P2P protocols into daemon for T2-T7 E2E coverage:

- Relay re-push: inbound Item-Push on relay role re-pushes to other
  peers with exclude_peer to prevent loops (P5 loop termination)
- Item-Sync server: handle SyncRequest/FetchRequest from peers,
  serve item headers and full items from local DB
- Pull-sync timer: every 10s, request missing items from a peer
  for each subscribed channel (anti-entropy convergence)
- exclude_peer field on PushItem for relay loop prevention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Comprehensive QA fix + killer features

Dark/Light Mode:
- Fix :root to use light colors (FAFBFD bg, 1A1D2B text, FFFFFF cards)
- .dark keeps dark colors (0C0F17 bg, E8ECF4 text, 141824 cards)
- Replace hardcoded inline color styles with Tailwind theme classes
  across dashboard, checklists, and SOP detail pages

SOP Generation UX:
- Add skeleton loader with pulsing animation while AI generates
- Auto-scroll to generated result after completion
- Add 6 SOP templates (Employee Onboarding, Complaint Handling, etc.)
  that pre-fill topic and auto-trigger generation

Upload & Reformat (new killer feature):
- New "Upload & Reformat" tab on /dashboard/sops/new
- Paste existing SOP text or upload .txt file
- /api/ai/reformat route reformats into structured SOP format
- 2 credits per reformat

Landing Page:
- Change "50+ teams" social proof to "Built for teams who refuse
  to lose knowledge"

SEO:
- Root title template: "%s — BossBoard"
- Page-specific titles: Dashboard, SOP Wiki, Create SOP, Checklists

Cleanup:
- Remove /api/ai/test debug endpoint
- Footer already has copyright and privacy/terms links

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stale ContextQ: read per-session cache instead of global

The statusline was reading quality-cache.json (one global file) which
gets overwritten by whichever session writes last. When multiple
sessions or subagents run, the last writer wins, causing stale scores
to display across all sessions.

Fix: statusline now reads per-session quality-cache-{uuid}.json:
1. By session_id from stdin (if Claude Code provides it)
2. By most recently modified per-session cache (fallback)
3. Global quality-cache.json (final fallback)

This ensures each session shows its own quality score and compaction
count, not a stale score from a different session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: TrueNAS bootstrap idempotency, data_root fix, admin_user UI, error handling

- setup_ssh: skip if homepilot already has sshpubkey set (midclt user.query check)
- setup_sudo: skip if docker path already in sudo_commands_nopasswd
- After bootstrap: auto-update data_root to {pool}/apps using discovered pool root
- Host editor: add admin_user field to TrueNAS settings form
- Bootstrap screen: catch make_bootstrap_service RuntimeError (empty admin_user)
  and show inline error message instead of traceback crash

Closes HomePilot-69m

commit.message:
Apply Nick Saraev blueprint to all 3 demo sites (starter, standard, premium)

Starter (Bella's Bakery):
- GSAP ScrollTrigger for smooth scroll reveals
- Noise overlay (subtle, light theme friendly)
- Serif italic accent on "Made with Love" hero text
- Manifesto section: "We bake everything from scratch. Every single day."
- Serif italic subtitles on all sections
- Magnetic button hovers with scale + shadow
- Upgraded footer with styled Violet Media link

Standard (Apex Fitness):
- FIXED critical JS bug: CSS @media queries embedded in JavaScript
- GSAP ScrollTrigger replacing broken IntersectionObserver
- Playfair Display serif italic for "Limits" in hero
- Manifesto section: "We remember your goals. We track your progress."
- Serif italic subtitles on all sections
- Noise overlay, magnetic button hovers
- Upgraded footer with rounded top + systems operational dot

Premium (Noir & Co.):
- GSAP ScrollTrigger with stagger delays replacing IntersectionObserver
- Manifesto section: "We compose environments that breathe."
- Noise overlay (film grain, mix-blend-mode overlay)
- Enhanced button hovers with subtle scale
- Upgraded footer: rounded top, tagline, systems operational dot
- ScrollTrigger.refresh() on page navigation
